name: hpam-translation-server
description: Live WebRTC translation server for Hari Prabodham Amrut Mahotsav 2026

scripts.build: tsc -p server/tsconfig.json && esbuild public/src/index.ts public/src/translator.ts public/src/listener.ts --bundle --outdir=public/dist --minify
scripts.dev: concurrently "nodemon --exec ts-node server/index.ts" "esbuild public/src/index.ts public/src/translator.ts public/src/listener.ts --bundle --outdir=public/dist --watch"
